creator: moiseev@mezonplus.ru
text:
(In reply to Danilo G. Baio from comment #5)

Hi Danilo,

Would you clarify, what is wrong with multiple sites in MASTER_SITES list? I thought it is recommended. Have I misunderstood https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#makefile-master_sites ?

I am afraid USE_GITHUB won't work for sysutils/backuppc and sysutils/backuppc4 as we need to fetch "prebuilt" release tarball instead of source code.
As far I understand, MASTER_SITES=	https://github.com/backuppc/backuppc/releases/download/${PORTVERSION}/ is the only option.
